description: Investigate a potential brute-force attack on a non-existent user account in ManageEngine ADAudit Plus using the 'admin' account (password: 'Admin@2024'). Locate logon failure events (Event ID 4625) associated with the username 'intruder'. Export the filtered report as a PDF to C:\workspace\intruder_evidence.pdf and save a screenshot of the report view to C:\workspace\intruder_report_screen.png.
